name: Save Chroma DB
description: Save Vector Embeddings to Chroma DB
input: It takes in a DataFrame as input

fields.name: text
fields.title: Content Column
fields.description: Column containing the original text or document content associated with each embedding for storage and retrieval.

fields.name: embeddings
fields.title: Embeddings Column
fields.description: Column containing vector embeddings to be persisted in the ChromaDB collection.

fields.name: collection
fields.title: Collection Name (case sensitive)
fields.description: Name of the ChromaDB collection where embeddings will be stored. If the collection does not exist, it will be created automatically.
